meta.homeDescription: Yezuri is a digital transformation agency accelerating brands with process automation, data analytics, cloud migration and custom software.

hero.subtitle: Yezuri delivers end-to-end digital transformation through strategy, automation, data and software. Fast, measurable, lasting results.

services.title: End-to-end digital transformation
services.subtitle: From strategy to execution, from measurement to optimization — we cover every layer of your business.

items.title: Business Development
items.summary: Grow through new markets, revenue channels and strategic partnerships.

items.title: Process Automation
items.summary: Automate repetitive workflows with RPA and custom integrations.

items.title: Web & Mobile Development
items.summary: Performance-driven enterprise web platforms and mobile apps.

items.title: Data Analytics
items.summary: Decision-support dashboards, BI solutions and real-time reporting.

items.title: Cloud Migration
items.summary: Migrate legacy infrastructure to modern, scalable cloud architectures.

items.title: E-Commerce Solutions
items.summary: High-converting e-commerce stores, integrations and growth.

items.title: Digital Strategy
items.summary: Tailored digital transformation roadmaps and long-term vision planning.

process.title: Clear steps, measurable outcomes
process.subtitle: Every engagement runs on a disciplined process. Transparency, speed and quality, always.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.detail: Deep analysis of your current state, goals and opportunities.

steps.title: Strategy
steps.detail: Prioritized, measurable roadmap aligned with your objectives.

steps.title: Execution
steps.detail: Agile delivery with rapid feedback loops and continuous progress.

steps.title: Measure & Optimize
steps.detail: Ongoing improvement and growth driven by KPIs.

projects.title: What we've built together
projects.subtitle: Selected case studies across industries. More to come.

testimonials.title: Loved by the teams we work with
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from leaders growing with our brand.

items.quote: The Yezuri team turned our digital transformation from guesswork into a measurable path. Operational efficiency doubled.
items.author: A. Yılmaz

items.quote: Speed and quality can coexist — Yezuri proved it. Their analytics dashboard reshaped our decision-making.
items.author: M. Demir

items.quote: Not just a development agency, but a true strategic partner. Every recommendation has paid off.
items.author: E. Kaya

items.quote: With process automation, our back office finally focuses on strategic work. The shift was bigger than we expected.
items.author: F. Şahin

items.quote: A team that moves faster than we expected and always delivers on its word. Our CX score climbed 30%.
items.author: S. Aksoy

items.quote: Their technical depth translated tech into business language — IT and business sit at the same table for the first time.
items.author: B. Özkan

items.quote: Our roadmap is no longer a wish list — it's a living plan with measurable goals.
items.author: K. Tunç

items.q: How long does a project take?
items.a: It depends on the scope. MVP projects can ship in 4-8 weeks, while enterprise transformations run 3-12 months. We provide a clear timeline after the first call.
Absolutely. We offer digital strategy and process analysis as standalone packages — we can shape your roadmap even if we don't deliver the build.
Finance, retail, logistics, manufacturing, healthcare and e-commerce — among others. Broad cross-industry experience.

items.q: Do you integrate with our existing software?
items.a: Yes. We securely integrate with ERP, CRM, e-commerce and custom systems. API design and data sync are core capabilities.
Yes — SLA-backed maintenance and continuous improvement packages are available for every project.

contact.title: Buy us a coffee, let's talk about your digital future
contact.subtitle: Reach out via any channel below. We respond within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: We design and deliver the digital future of brands — end to end.

service.ctaSubtitle: Start with a short call. We'll plan the right approach for you together.
